scene.description: Frosted glass intelligence orb floating in warm ivory void. Four thin glass abstract shapes slowly orbit: chart arc, megaphone silhouette, target rings, document stack.
scene.mood: calm premium GTM intelligence, CURA-style cinematic

camera.notes: 10 second loop; final frame matches first frame for seamless repeat

render_prompt: 10 second seamless loop, 16:9, 24fps. Cinematic slow camera drift around a frosted glass orb in ivory space (#F8F6F2). Glass marketing icons orbit slowly. Indigo rim light, subtle coral glow pulse. Premium product film, no text, loopable.
